description_long: This is a low-cut oxford-style shoe featuring a smooth white leather upper with detailed stitching along the toe box and sides. The shoe has a contrasting brown suede heel counter and matching brown laces threaded through five eyelets on each side. The sole is made of a light tan rubber or crepe material, providing a casual yet refined appearance. The interior lining appears to be a light brown synthetic or leather material, offering comfort and durability. The overall design is classic and versatile, suitable for both casual and semi-formal urban settings. No visible branding or logos are present on the exterior surfaces.
description: A white oxford-style shoe with brown suede heel, brown laces, and a tan rubber sole. The design is clean, classic, and versatile.
description_view_0: Front view shows the rounded toe, white upper, and brown laces with visible stitching details.
description_view_1: Left side view highlights the white leather upper, brown suede heel, and tan sole profile.
description_view_2: Rear view displays the brown suede heel counter and the seamless transition to the tan sole.
description_view_3: Right side view mirrors the left, showing the white upper, brown heel, and tan sole.
